showWorkloadSummary(summary) {\n713\t            const el = document.getElementById('workloadSummary');\n714\t            const parts = [];\n715\t\n716\t            if (summary.pending_intents > 0) {\n717\t                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.pending_intents}</strong> pending intents`);\n718\t            }\n719\t            if (summary.new_results > 0) {\n720\t                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.new_results}</strong> new results`);\n721\t            }\n722\t            if (summary.unresolved_exceptions > 0) {\n723\t   }\n733\t\n734\t        async function registerSurface() {\n735\t            try {\n736\t                const response = await fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/register', {\n737\t                    method: first-run welcome card\n757\t        // (config/registry.yaml → GET /api/v1/registry). DB/result independent —\n758\t        // the welcome card renders even against an empty component store. Cached\n759\t        // after the first fetch so the per-SSE-event reloads don't refetch it.\n760\t        let welcomeProjects = null;\n761\t\n762\t        async function loadWelcomeProjects() {\n763\t            if (welcomeProjects) return welcomeProjects;\n764\t            try {\n765\t                const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/registry');\n766\t                if (resp.ok) {\n767\t                    const data = await resp.json();\n768\t                    welcomeProjects = (data && data.projects) || [];\n769\t                    return welcomeProjects;\n770\t                }\n771\t            } catch (error) {\n772\t                console.error('Error loading registry for welcome card:', error);\n773\t            }\n774\t            // Graceful fallback: an empty list still renders the welcome card\n775\t            // (with default example utterances), so a wedged registry endpoint\n776\t            // never leaves the canvas bare.\n777\t            welcomeProjects = [];\n778\t            return welcomeProjects;\n779\t        }\n780\t\n781\t        async function loadTopics() {\n782\t            try {\n783\t                const response = await fetch(`/api/v1/sessions/${sessionId}/topics`);\n784\t                if (!response.ok) return;\n785\t\n786\t                const data = await response.json();\n787\t                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n788\t                const cards = data.cards || [];\n789\t\n790\t                // Fresh session (zero topics): show the first-run welcome card\n791\t                // instead of the bare empty-state. Its project list + example\n792\t                // utterances come from the registry (never the DB), so we only\n793\t                // need to fetch it on the zero-card branch. The welcome card is\n794\t                // dropped — not duplicated — the moment the first real result\n795\t                // lands: the next SSE result_created → loadTopics() reload\n796\t                // yields a non-empty card set, so buildContainerChildren()\n797\t                // returns topic cards only (clearing the welcome card).\n798\t                const projects = cards.length ? [] : await loadWelcomeProjects();\n799\t\n800\t                container.innerHTML = '';\n801\t                buildContainerChildren(cards, projects).forEach(node => {\n802\t                    container.appendChild(node);\n803\t                });\n804\t            } catch (error) {\n805\t                console.error('Error loading topics:', error);\n806\t            }\n807\t        }\n808\t\n809\t        function connectSSE() {\n810\t            updateConnectionStatus('connecting', 'Connecting...');\n811\t\n812\t            const url = `/api/v1/sse?surface_id=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceId)}&session_id=${encodeURIComponent(sessionId)}&surface_type=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceType)}`;\n813\t            eventSource = new EventSource(url);\n814\t\n815\t            eventSource.onopen = () => {\n816\t                updateConnectionStatus('', 'Connected');\n817\t                loadTopics();\n818\t            };\n819\t\n820\t            eventSource.onerror = (error) => {\n821\t                console.error('SSE error:', error);\n822\t                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n823\t            };\n824\t\n825\t            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {\n826\t                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n827\t                console.log('SSE connected:', data);\n828\t            });\n829\t\n830\t            eventSource.addEventListener('workload_summary', (event) => {\n831\t                const summary = didn't\n836\t            // include them (e.g., the response arrived before the intent was routed).\n837\t            eventSource.addEventListener('dispatch_ack', (event) => {\n838\t                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n839\t                const utteranceId = data.utterance_id;\n840\t                const intentIds = data.intent_ids;\n841\t                const utterance = data.utterance;\n842\t\n843\t                if (!utteranceId || !intentIds || !Array.isArray(intentIds)) return;\n844\t\n845\t                // Check if there's an existing placeholder to split\n846\t                const placeholder = pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n847\t                const createdAt = placeholder\n848\t                    ? placeholder.parentNode) {\n857\t                    // Replace the placeholder with the thread cards\n858\t                    const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n859\t                    threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n860\t                    placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, placeholder);\n861\t                } else {\n862\t                    // No placeholder (test scenario or race condition): prepend thread cards\n863\t                    const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n864\t                    threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n865\t                    container.insertBefore(frag, container.firstChild);\n866\t                }\n867\t\n868\t                // No eventSource.addEventListener('thread_progress', (event) => {\n874\t                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n875\t                const threadId = data.thread_id;\n876\t\n877\t                if (!threadId) {\n878\t                    console.warn('thread_progress: missing thread_id in event data');\n879\t                    return;\n880\t                }\n881\t\n882\t                // Find the pending thread card by thread_id\n883\t                const threadCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + threadId + '\"]');\n884\t                if (!threadCard) {\n885\t                    console.warn('thread_progress: threadCard not found for thread_id=' + threadId);\n886\t                    return;\n887\t                }\n888\t                if       return;\n891\t                }\n892\t                if (typeof _setProgress !== 'function') {\n893\t                    console.warn('thread_progress: _setProgress is not a function');\n894\t                    return;\n895\t                }\n896\t\n897\t                // Pass progress message (e.g., '3/5 sources in') to _setProgress()\n898\t                const completed = data.completed;\n899\t                const total = data.total;\n900\t                _setProgress(threadCard, { completed: completed, total: total });\n901\t            });\n902\t\n903\t            // Per-source progress update for a thread\n904\t            eventSource.addEventListener('progress_update', (event) => {\n905\t                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n906\t                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n907\t                const completed = data.completed;\n908\t                const total = data.total;\n909\t\n910\t                if (!intentId) _setProgress is not a function');\n924\t                    return;\n925\t                }\n926\t                _setProgress(threadCard, { completed: completed, total: total });\n927\t            });\n928\t\n929\t            eventSource.addEventListener('result_created', (event) => {\n930\t                const result = JSON.parse(event.data);\n931\t                console.log('New result:',         const topic = JSON.parse(event.data);\n937\t                console.log('Topic updated:', topic);\n938\t                loadTopics();\n939\t            });\n940\t\n941\t            eventSource.addEventListener('disconnect', (event) => {\n942\t                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n943\t                console.log('Server disconnect:', data);\n944\t                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n945\t                eventSource.close();\n946\t            });\n947\t        }\n948\t\n949\t        // Elapsed-time ticker for pending cards\n950\t        // Every second, update the elapsed-time footer on all pending cards\n951\t        // and apply aged treatment if they've exceeded the 30s threshold.\n952\t async function dispatch(utterance) {\n1001\t            if (!utterance) return;\n1002\t            textarea.value = '';\n1003\t            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n1004\t            btnSend.disabled = true;\n1005\t\n1006\t            // Generate a client-side pending ID for the placeholder. We'll swap it\n1007\t            // for the server's utterance_id when the response arrives.\n1008\t            var pendingId = 'pending-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 8);\n1009\t            var createdAt = Date.now();\n1010\t\n1011\t            // Create the pending placeholder NOW, before the server round-trip,\n1012\t            // so a hung server still leaves a card on canvas to age.\n1013\t            var placeholder = createPendingPlaceholderCard(utterance, createdAt, pendingId);\n1014\t            var container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n1015\t\n1016\t            // Clear the empty-state/loading spinner if present\n1017\t            if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n1018\t                container.innerHTML = '';\n1019\t            }\n1020\t\n1021\t            // Prepend the placeholder (newest first)\n1022\t            container.insertBefore(placeholder, container.firstChild);\n1023\t\n1024\t            // Track it so we can find/replace it later\n1025\t            pendingPlaceholders[pendingId] = placeholder;\n1026\t\n1027\t            try {\n1028\t                var resp = await fetch('/dispatch', {\n1029\t                    method: 'POST',\n1030\t                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n1031\t                    body: JSON.stringify({ utterance, session_id: sessionId, surface_id: surfaceId, pending_id: pendingId }),\n1032\t                });\n1033\t\n1034\t                if (!resp.ok) {\n1035\t                    var errText = await resp.text();\n1036\t                    console.error('Dispatch error:', errText);\n1037\t                    // Try to parse as JSON for structured error\n1038\t                    var errData;\n1039\t                    try { errData = JSON.parse(errText); } catch (e) {}\n1040\t                    if (errData && errData.error_type) {\n1041\t                        // Replace placeholder with error card\n1042\t                        var errorCard = createErrorCard(errData);\n1043\t                        if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n1044\t                            placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(errorCard, placeholder);\n1045\t                        }\n1046\t                        delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n1047\t                    }\n1048\t                    return;\n1049\t                }\n1050\t\n1051\t                var data = await resp.json();\n1052\t                // Swap to the server's utterance_id for consistency\n1053\t                var utteranceId = data.utterance_id || pendingId;\n1054\t                placeholder.dataset.pendingId = utteranceId;\n1055\t\n1056\t                // Move the placeholder tracking to the new key\n1057\t                delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n1058\t                pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId] = placeholder;\n1059\t\n1060\t                // If intent_ids are present, split into per-thread pending cards\n1061\t                if (data.intent_ids && Array.isArray(data.intent_ids) && data.intent_ids.length > 0) {\n1062\t                    var threadCards = splitPlaceholderToThreads(utterance, createdAt, data.intent_ids);\n1063\t                    // Replace the placeholder with the thread cards\n1064\t                    if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n1065\t                        var frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n1066\t                        threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n1067\t                        placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, placeholder);\n1068\t                    }\n1069\t                    delete pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n1070\t                }\n1071\t            } catch (err) {\n1072\t                console.error('Dispatch failed:', err);\n1073\t            }\n1074\t        }\n1075\t\n1076\t        // Web Speech API mic\n1077\t        let recognition = null;\n1078\t\n1079\t        if ('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window || 'SpeechRecognition' in window) {\n1080\t            const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;\n1081\t            recognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n1082\t            recognition.continuous = false;\n1083\t            recognition.interimResults = true;\n1084\t            recognition.lang = 'en-US';\n1085\t\n1086\t            let finalTranscript = '';\n1087\t\n1088\t            recognition.onstart = () => {\n1089\t                btnMic.classList.add('recording');\n1090\t                finalTranscript = textarea.value;\n1091\t            };\n1092\t\n1093\t            recognition.onresult = (e) => {\n1094\t                let interim = '';\n1095\t                for (let i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {\n1096\t                    if (e.results[i].isFinal) {\n1097\t                        finalTranscript += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n1098\t                    } else {\n1099\t                        interim += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n1100\t                    }\n1101\t                }\n1102\t                textarea.value = finalTranscript + interim;\n1103\t                textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n1104\t                textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n1105\t                btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n1106\t            };\n1107\t\n1108\t            recognition.onend = () => {\n1109\t                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n1110\t                if (finalTranscript.trim()) dispatch(finalTranscript.trim());\n1111\t            };\n1112\t\n1113\t            recognition.onerror = (e) => {\n1114\t                console.error('Speech recognition error:', e.error);\n1115\t                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n1116\t            };\n1117\t\n1118\t            btnMic.addEventListener('click', () => {\n1119\t                if (btnMic.classList.contains('recording')) {\n1120\t                    recognition.stop();\n1121\t                } else {\n1122\t                    recognition.start();\n1123\t                }\n1124\t            });\n1125\t        } else {\n1126\t            // Fallback: MediaRecorder + whisper-stt for browsers without Web Speech API\n1127\t            let mediaRecorder = null;\n1128\t            let audioChunks = [];\n1129\t\n1130\t            async function startRecording() {\n1131\t                try {\n1132\t                    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });\n1133\t                    mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);\n1134\t                    audioChunks = [];\n1135\t\n1136\t                    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {\n1137\t                        if (event.data.size > 0) {\n1138\t                            audioChunks.push(event.data);\n1139\t                        }\n1140\t                    };\n1141\t\n1142\t                    mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {\n1143\t                        btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n1144\t                        btnMic.innerHTML = '🎤';\n1145\t\n1146\t                        // Create audio blob and convert to base64\n1147\t                        const audioBlob = new Blob(audioChunks, { type: 'audio/webm' });\n1148\t                        const reader = new FileReader();\n1149\t                        reader.onloadend = async () => {\n1150\t                            const base64Audio = reader.result.split(',')[1];\n1151\t\n1152\t                            try {\n1153\t                                const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/stt', {\n1154\t                                    method: 'POST',\n1155\t                                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n1156\t                                    body: JSON.stringify({\n1157\t                                        audio_data: base64Audio,\n1158\t                                        format: 'webm'\n1159\t                                    })\n1160\t                                });\n1161\t\n1162\t                                if (resp.ok) {\n1163\t                                    const data = await resp.json();\n1164\t                                    if (data.text) {\n1165\t                                        textarea.value = data.text;\n1166\t                                        textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n1167\t                                        textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n1168\t                                        btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n1169\t                                        // Auto-dispatch on successful transcription\n1170\t                                        dispatch(data.text.trim());\n1171\t                                    }\n1172\t                                } else {\n1173\t                                    const err = await resp.json();\n1174\t                                    console.error('STT error:', err);\n1175\t                                    btnMic.title = `Transcription failed: ${err.error || 'Unknown error'}`;\n1176\t                                    setTimeout(() => {\n1177\t                                        btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n1178\t                                    }, 3000);\n1179\t                                }\n1180\t                            } catch (err) {\n1181\t                                console.error('STT request failed:', err);\n1182\t                                btnMic.title = 'STT service unavailable';\n1183\t                                setTimeout(() => {\n1184\t                                    btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n1185\t                                }, 3000);\n1186\t 8px;\n        }\n\n        .pending-aged-note {\n            margin-top: 12px;\n            padding: 8px 12px;\n            background: #3f1f1f;\n            border-radius: 6px;\n            font-size: 13px;\n            color: #fca5a5;\n        }\n\n        .pending-retry {\n            background: #ef4444;\n            border: none;\n            color: #f8fafc;\n            padding: 4px .error-utterance {\n            color: #f8fafc;\n            font-style: italic;\n        }\n\n        .error-source-name {\n            color: #f8fafc;\n            font-weight: 500;\n        }\n\n        .error-source-reason {\n            color: #fca5a5;\n        }\n\n        .error-raw-label {\n            font-size: 12px;\n            color: #94a3b8;\n            margin: 12px 0 4px 0;\n        }\n\n        .error-raw {\n            background: #0f1419;\n            border: 1px solid #334155;\n            border-radius: 6px;\n            padding: 8px;\n            font-size: 12px;\n           font-size: 13px;\n            cursor: pointer;\n            margin-top: 12px;\n        }\n\n        .error-retry:hover {\n            background: #2563eb;\n        }\n\n        /* Fallback font-weight: 500;\n        }\n\n        .fallback-val {\n            font-size: 12px;\n            color: #cbd5e1;\n            word-break: break-all;\n        }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <div class=\"container\">\n        <header>\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px\">\n                <h1>ADC Canvas</h1>\n                <span id=\"versionBadge\" style=\"font-size:12px;color:#475569;font-weight:500;font-family:'Monaco','Menlo',monospace\"></span>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"status\">\n                <span class=\"status-dot\" id=\"statusDot\"></span>\n                <span id=\"statusText\">Connecting...</span>\n            </div>\n        </header>\n\n        <div class=\"workload-summary\" id=\"workloadSummary\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"input-bar\">\n            <textarea\n                id=\"inputTextarea\"\n                class=\"input-textarea\"\n                placeholder=\"Ask anything — status of the options pipeline, what's in flight, open beads…\"\n                rows=\"1\"\n            ></textarea>\n            <button class=\"btn-mic\" id=\"btnMic\" title=\"Voice input\">\n                <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n                    <path d=\"M12 2a3 3 0 0 0-3 3v7a3 3 0 0 0 6 0V5a3 3 0 0 0-3-3z\"/>\n                    <path d=\"M19 10v2a7 7 0 0 1-14 0v-2\"/>\n                    <line x1=\"12\" y1=\"19\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"23\"/>\n                    <line x1=\"8\" y1=\"23\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"23\"/>\n                </svg>\n            </button>\n            <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"btnSend\" title=\"Send\" disabled>\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n                    <line x1=\"22\" y1=\"2\" x2=\"11\" y2=\"13\"/>\n                    <polygon points=\"22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2\"/>\n                </svg>\n            </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div id=\"topicsContainer\" class=\"topics-grid\">\n            <div class=\"loading\">\n                <div class=\"spinner\"></div>\n                <span>Loading topics...</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Render helpers (createTopicCard + friends) — loaded before the app\n         script so they're available as globals and unit-testable headlessly. -->\n    <script src=\"/canvas.js\"></script>\n    <script>\n        // Session and surface IDs from URL params or generate new\n        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n        const sessionId = urlParams.get('session_id') || generateId();\n        const surfaceType = 'canvas';\n\n        let surfaceId = null;\n        let eventSource = null;\n\n        // Track pending placeholders so we can find/replace them later.\n        // Key: pendingId (utterance_id), Value: placeholder HTMLElement.\n        var pendingPlaceholders = {};\n\n        // Update URL with session_id for reload persistence\n        if (!urlParams.get('session_id')) {\n            urlParams.set('session_id', sessionId);\n            window.history.replaceState({}, '', `${window.location.pathname}?${urlParams}`);\n        }\n\n        function generateId() {\n            return 'adc-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 16);\n        }\n\n        // createTopicCard / escapeHtml / formatStaleness / getStalenessLevel live\n        // in /canvas.js (loaded below as a blocking <script src> before this\n        // block), so they are available as globals here and unit-testable\n        // headlessly. See src/canvas/canvas.js.\n\n        function updateConnectionStatus(status, text) {\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText');\n\n            dot.className = 'status-dot ' + status;\n            statusText.textContent = text;\n        }\n\n        function showWorkloadSummary(summary) {\n            const el = document.getElementById('workloadSummary');\n            const parts = [];\n\n            if (summary.pending_intents > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.pending_intents}</strong> pending intents`);\n            }\n            if (summary.new_results > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.new_results}</strong> new results`);\n            }\n            if (summary.unresolved_exceptions > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.unresolved_exceptions}</strong> unresolved exceptions`);\n            }\n\n            if (parts.length > 0) {\n                el.innerHTML = '📊 While you were away: ' + parts.join(', ');\n                el.classList.add('show');\n            } else {\n                el.classList.remove('show');\n            }\n        }\n\n        async function registerSurface() {\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/register', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                        session_id: sessionId,\n                        surface_type: surfaceType\n                    })\n                });\n\n                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to register surface');\n\n                const data = await response.json();\n                surfaceId = data.surface_id;\n                return surfaceId;\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error registering surface:', error);\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Registry project list for the first-run welcome card\n        // (config/registry.yaml → GET /api/v1/registry). DB/result independent —\n        // the welcome card renders even against an empty component store. Cached\n        // after the first fetch so the per-SSE-event reloads don't refetch it.\n        let welcomeProjects = null;\n\n        async function loadWelcomeProjects() {\n            if (welcomeProjects) return welcomeProjects;\n            try {\n                const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/registry');\n                if (resp.ok) {\n                    const data = await resp.json();\n                    welcomeProjects = (data && data.projects) || [];\n                    return welcomeProjects;\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error loading registry for welcome card:', error);\n            }\n            // Graceful fallback: an empty list still renders the welcome card\n            // (with default example utterances), so a wedged registry endpoint\n            // never leaves the canvas bare.\n            welcomeProjects = [];\n            return welcomeProjects;\n        }\n\n        async function loadTopics() {\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch(`/api/v1/sessions/${sessionId}/topics`);\n                if (!response.ok) return;\n\n                const data = await response.json();\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n                const cards = data.cards || [];\n\n                // Fresh session (zero topics): show the first-run welcome card\n                // instead of the bare empty-state. Its project list + example\n                // utterances come from the registry (never the DB), so we only\n                // need to fetch it on the zero-card branch. The welcome card is\n                // dropped — not duplicated — the moment the first real result\n                // lands: the next SSE result_created → loadTopics() reload\n                // yields a non-empty card set, so buildContainerChildren()\n                // returns topic cards only (clearing the welcome card).\n                const projects = cards.length ? [] : await loadWelcomeProjects();\n\n                container.innerHTML = '';\n                buildContainerChildren(cards, projects).forEach(node => {\n                    container.appendChild(node);\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error loading topics:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        function connectSSE() {\n            updateConnectionStatus('connecting', 'Connecting...');\n\n            const url = `/api/v1/sse?surface_id=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceId)}&session_id=${encodeURIComponent(sessionId)}&surface_type=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceType)}`;\n            eventSource = new EventSource(url);\n\n            eventSource.onopen = () => {\n                updateConnectionStatus('', 'Connected');\n                loadTopics();\n            };\n\n            eventSource.onerror = (error) => {\n                console.error('SSE error:', error);\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n            };\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('SSE connected:', data);\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('workload_summary', (event) => {\n                const summary = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                showWorkloadSummary(summary);\n            });\n\n            // Dispatch ack: backup path for intent_ids if the fetch response didn't\n            // include them (e.g., the response arrived before the intent was routed).\n            eventSource.addEventListener('dispatch_ack', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                const utteranceId = data.utterance_id;\n                const intentIds = data.intent_ids;\n                const utterance = data.utterance;\n\n                if (!utteranceId || !intentIds || !Array.isArray(intentIds)) return;\n\n                // Check if there's an existing placeholder to split\n                const placeholder = pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n                const createdAt = placeholder\n                    ? parseInt(placeholder.dataset.createdAt, 10)\n                    : Date.now();\n\n                // Split into per-thread pending cards\n                const threadCards = splitPlaceholderToThreads(utterance, createdAt, intentIds);\n\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n                    // Replace the placeholder with the thread cards\n                    const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n                    threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n                    placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, placeholder);\n                } else {\n                    // No placeholder (test scenario or race condition): prepend thread cards\n                    const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n                    threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n                    container.insertBefore(frag, container.firstChild);\n                }\n\n                // No longer track this placeholder\n                delete pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n            });\n\n            // Thread-level progress event\n            eventSource.addEventListener('thread_progress', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                const threadId = data.thread_id;\n\n                if (!threadId) {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: missing thread_id in event data');\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Find the pending thread card by thread_id\n                const threadCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + threadId + '\"]');\n                if (!threadCard) {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: threadCard not found for thread_id=' + threadId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (!threadCard.classList.contains('pending-card')) {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: threadCard does not have pending-card class for thread_id=' + threadId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (typeof _setProgress !== 'function') {\n                    console.warn('thread_progress: _setProgress is not a function');\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Pass progress message (e.g., '3/5 sources in') to _setProgress()\n                const completed = data.completed;\n                const total = data.total;\n                _setProgress(threadCard, { completed: completed, total: total });\n            });\n\n            // Per-source progress update for a thread\n            eventSource.addEventListener('progress_update', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                const intentId = data.intent_id;\n                const completed = data.completed;\n                const total = data.total;\n\n                if (!intentId) return;\n\n                // Find the pending thread card by intent_id\n                const threadCard = document.querySelector('[data-pending-id=\"' + intentId + '\"]');\n                if (!threadCard) {\n                    console.warn('progress_update: threadCard is null for intent_id=' + intentId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (!threadCard.classList.contains('pending-card')) {\n                    console.warn('progress_update: threadCard does not have pending-card class for intent_id=' + intentId);\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (typeof _setProgress !== 'function') {\n                    console.warn('progress_update: _setProgress is not a function');\n                    return;\n                }\n                _setProgress(threadCard, { completed: completed, total: total });\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('result_created', (event) => {\n                const result = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('New result:', result);\n                loadTopics(); // Reload topics to show new result\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('topic_updated', (event) => {\n                const topic = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Topic updated:', topic);\n                loadTopics();\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('disconnect', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Server disconnect:', data);\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n                eventSource.close();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Elapsed-time ticker for pending cards\n        // Every second, update the elapsed-time footer on all pending cards\n        // and apply aged treatment if they've exceeded the 30s threshold.\n        setInterval(function () {\n            var now = Date.now();\n            var pendingCards = document.querySelectorAll('.pending-card[data-pending-id]');\n            pendingCards.forEach(function (card) {\n                tickPendingElapsed(card, now);\n                applyAgedTreatment(card, now);\n            });\n        }, 1000);\n\n        // Heartbeat to keep surface alive\n        setInterval(() => {\n            if (surfaceId) {\n                fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/heartbeat', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                        surface_id: surfaceId,\n                        session_id: sessionId\n                    })\n                }).catch(console.error);\n            }\n        }, 30000); // Every 30 seconds\n\n        // ── Input bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n        const textarea = document.getElementById('inputTextarea');\n        const btnSend  = document.getElementById('btnSend');\n        const btnMic   = document.getElementById('btnMic');\n\n        // Auto-resize textarea\n        textarea.addEventListener('input', () => {\n            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n            textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n            btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n        });\n\n        // Send on Enter (Shift+Enter = newline)\n        textarea.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                if (!btnSend.disabled) dispatch(textarea.value.trim());\n            }\n        });\n\n        btnSend.addEventListener('click', () => {\n            if (!btnSend.disabled) dispatch(textarea.value.trim());\n        });\n\n        async function dispatch(utterance) {\n            if (!utterance) return;\n            textarea.value = '';\n            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n            btnSend.disabled = true;\n\n            // Generate a client-side pending ID for the placeholder. We'll swap it\n            // for the server's utterance_id when the response arrives.\n            var pendingId = 'pending-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 8);\n            var createdAt = Date.now();\n\n            // Create the pending placeholder NOW, before the server round-trip,\n            // so a hung server still leaves a card on canvas to age.\n            var placeholder = createPendingPlaceholderCard(utterance, createdAt, pendingId);\n            var container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n            // Clear the empty-state/loading spinner if present\n            if (container.querySelector('.loading') || container.querySelector('.empty-state')) {\n                container.innerHTML = '';\n            }\n\n            // Prepend the placeholder (newest first)\n            container.insertBefore(placeholder, container.firstChild);\n\n            // Track it so we can find/replace it later\n            pendingPlaceholders[pendingId] = placeholder;\n\n            try {\n                var resp = await fetch('/dispatch', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({ utterance, session_id: sessionId, surface_id: surfaceId, pending_id: pendingId }),\n                });\n\n                if (!resp.ok) {\n                    var errText = await resp.text();\n                    console.error('Dispatch error:', errText);\n                    // Try to parse as JSON for structured error\n                    var errData;\n                    try { errData = JSON.parse(errText); } catch (e) {}\n                    if (errData && errData.error_type) {\n                        // Replace placeholder with error card\n                        var errorCard = createErrorCard(errData);\n                        if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n                            placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(errorCard, placeholder);\n                        }\n                        delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n                    }\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                var data = await resp.json();\n                // Swap to the server's utterance_id for consistency\n                var utteranceId = data.utterance_id || pendingId;\n                placeholder.dataset.pendingId = utteranceId;\n\n                // Move the placeholder tracking to the new key\n                delete pendingPlaceholders[pendingId];\n                pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId] = placeholder;\n\n                // If intent_ids are present, split into per-thread pending cards\n                if (data.intent_ids && Array.isArray(data.intent_ids) && data.intent_ids.length > 0) {\n                    var threadCards = splitPlaceholderToThreads(utterance, createdAt, data.intent_ids);\n                    // Replace the placeholder with the thread cards\n                    if (placeholder && placeholder.parentNode) {\n                        var frag = document.createDocumentFragment();\n                        threadCards.forEach(function (c) { frag.appendChild(c); });\n                        placeholder.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, placeholder);\n                    }\n                    delete pendingPlaceholders[utteranceId];\n                }\n            } catch (err) {\n                console.error('Dispatch failed:', err);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Web Speech API mic\n        let recognition = null;\n\n        if ('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window || 'SpeechRecognition' in window) {\n            const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;\n            recognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n            recognition.continuous = false;\n            recognition.interimResults = true;\n            recognition.lang = 'en-US';\n\n            let finalTranscript = '';\n\n            recognition.onstart = () => {\n                btnMic.classList.add('recording');\n                finalTranscript = textarea.value;\n            };\n\n            recognition.onresult = (e) => {\n                let interim = '';\n                for (let i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {\n                    if (e.results[i].isFinal) {\n                        finalTranscript += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n                    } else {\n                        interim += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n                    }\n                }\n                textarea.value = finalTranscript + interim;\n                textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n                textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n                btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n            };\n\n            recognition.onend = () => {\n                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n                if (finalTranscript.trim()) dispatch(finalTranscript.trim());\n            };\n\n            recognition.onerror = (e) => {\n                console.error('Speech recognition error:', e.error);\n                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n            };\n\n            btnMic.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                if (btnMic.classList.contains('recording')) {\n                    recognition.stop();\n                } else {\n                    recognition.start();\n                }\n            });\n        } else {\n            // Fallback: MediaRecorder + whisper-stt for browsers without Web Speech API\n            let mediaRecorder = null;\n            let audioChunks = [];\n\n            async function startRecording() {\n                try {\n                    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });\n                    mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);\n                    audioChunks = [];\n\n                    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {\n                        if (event.data.size > 0) {\n                            audioChunks.push(event.data);\n                        }\n                    };\n\n                    mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {\n                        btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n                        btnMic.innerHTML = '🎤';\n\n                        // Create audio blob and convert to base64\n                        const audioBlob = new Blob(audioChunks, { type: 'audio/webm' });\n                        const reader = new FileReader();\n                        reader.onloadend = async () => {\n                            const base64Audio = reader.result.split(',')[1];\n\n                            try {\n                                const resp = await fetch('/api/v1/stt', {\n                                    method: 'POST',\n                                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                                        audio_data: base64Audio,\n                                        format: 'webm'\n                                    })\n                                });\n\n                                if (resp.ok) {\n                                    const data = await resp.json();\n                                    if (data.text) {\n                                        textarea.value = data.text;\n                                        textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n                                        textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n                                        btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n                                        // Auto-dispatch on successful transcription\n                                        dispatch(data.text.trim());\n                                    }\n                                } else {\n                                    const err = await resp.json();\n                                    console.error('STT error:', err);\n                                    btnMic.title = `Transcription failed: ${err.error || 'Unknown error'}`;\n                                    setTimeout(() => {\n                                        btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n                                    }, 3000);\n                                }\n                            } catch (err) {\n                                console.error('STT request failed:', err);\n                                btnMic.title = 'STT service unavailable';\n                                setTimeout(() => {\n                                    btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n                                }, 3000);\n                            }\n                        };\n                        reader.readAsDataURL(audioBlob);\n\n                        // Stop all tracks to release microphone\n                        stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());\n                    };\n\n                    mediaRecorder.start();\n                    btnMic.classList.add('recording');\n                    btnMic.innerHTML = '⏹';\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.error('MediaRecorder access failed:', err);\n                    btnMic.title = 'Microphone access denied';\n                    btnMic.style.opacity = '0.4';\n                    btnMic.disabled = true;\n                }\n            }\n\n            function stopRecording() {\n                if (mediaRecorder && mediaRecorder.state === 'recording') {\n                    mediaRecorder.stop();\n                }\n            }\n\n            btnMic.title = 'Click to record (whisper-stt fallback)';\n            btnMic.disabled = false;\n            btnMic.style.opacity = '1';\n\n            btnMic.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                if (btnMic.classList.contains('recording')) {\n                    stopRecording();\n                } else {\n                    startRecording();\n                }\n            });\n        }\n\n        // ── Initialize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n        // Initialize\n        async function init() {\n            try {\n                // Show version\n                const meta = await fetch('/openapi.json').then(r => r.json()).catch(() => null);\n                if (meta && meta.info && meta.info.version) {\n                    document.getElementById('versionBadge').textContent = 'v' + meta.info.version;\n                }\n\n                await registerSurface();\n                connectSSE();\n            } catch (error) {\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Failed to connect');\n                console.error('Initialization error:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        init();\n    </script>\n\n    <!-- ── Agentation: element-selector feedback toolbar ────────────────────── -->\n    <script>\n    (function () {\n        var active = false;\n        var selectedEl = null;\n\n        // Build a stable CSS selector for a given element\n        function buildSelector(el) {\n            if (!el || el === document.body) return 'body';\n            var parts = [];\n            var cur = el;\n            while (cur && cur !== document.body && cur !== document.documentElement) {\n                if (cur.id) { parts.unshift('#' + cur.id); break; }\n                var tag = cur.tagName.toLowerCase();\n                var classes = Array.from(cur.classList)\n                    .filter(function (c) { return c.length > 1; })\n                    .slice(0, 2);\n
